data.name: Actual Roommates!
data.detailed_description:
What happens when the mistakes you made when you were younger come back to haunt you?
Do you try and make amends or embrace them as part of yourself?



Our heroine moves in a new apartment with some quirky roommates and a very talkative cat.
As things are starting to look up for her, her past comes knocking, in the form of a very angry Japanese heiress and corporate conspiracy that will spark a war between their companies.

Will she try unravel said conspiracy or just headbutt away her problems? Will she retake control of her life or just go with the flow? And why is everyone so goddamn horny???



Actual Roommates is a very horny, very lesbian comedy VN about a goth girl with some baggage.

Find her the perfect girl (or build her a sapphic harem), make her a perfect bottom or an aggressive top and guide her through a very important(?), very serious(???) plot with its heartfelt moments and ridiculous fight scenes.

Also there's a cat! And he's got his own episode!

Features:
- 12 Endings;
- 40+ Sex scenes;
- 2 Diverging storylines;
- 8-10 hours of gameplay;
- Built-in optional walkthrough;
- A Special Cat Episode.

data.short_description: An Adult Visual Novel about a young lesbian, her horny roommates and an overcomplicated corporate conspiracy.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7
  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space

Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Ubuntu 16.04+
